Schemable Validator
Main Navigation GuideGitHub

Appearance

Schemable ValidatorPHP constraints → JSON Schema → any JS framework

Define validation rules once in PHP. Export to JSON Schema draft 2020-12. Consume from any JavaScript framework without duplication.

Get Started
SchemaBuilder

Single source of truth

Define all constraints with SV::object() in PHP. Server-side validation and JSON Schema output share the same definition — no duplication.

JSON Schema draft 2020-12

toJson() exports a standards-compliant schema. Any JSON Schema-aware tool — validators, editors, code generators — can consume it.

Framework-agnostic SDK

@schemable-validator/sdk provides a TypeScript ROP-based validation pipeline. Works with Zod, React, Vue, or plain JavaScript.

WordPress ready

REST endpoint with ETag caching, schv_register_schema() helper, and admin UI included. Drop in as a WordPress plugin.
